```gherkin
Feature: Bulk Review Request Action

  Scenario: Clicking on Review Request action opens Bulk Review Request page
    Given I am on the main page
    When I click on the 'Review Request' action in the footer dropdown
    Then the Bulk Review Request page should be opened
```

Python:
```python
from behave import given, when, then

@given('I am on the main page')
def step_impl(context):
    context.browser.get('http://example.com/main')

@when('I click on the "Review Request" action in the footer dropdown')

    review_request_button = context.browser.find_element_by_id('review-request-action')
    review_request_button.click()

@then('the Bulk Review Request page should be opened')
def step_impl(context):
    assert 'Bulk Review Request' in context.browser.title
```

User Story: PB - (Misc) As a User, I want to set auto-play as default or not for Video Widgets when viewing a Smart Page
Output:
Gherkin:
Feature: Video Widget Auto-Play Setting
  Scenario: Set auto-play as default for Video Widgets
    Given I am on a Smart Page with a Video Widget
    When I check the auto-play button for the Video Widget
    Then the auto-play setting should be enabled for the Video Widget

Python:
from behave import given, when, then

@given('I am on a Smart Page with a Video Widget')
def step_impl(context):
    context.page = context.browser.new_page()
    context.page.goto("http://example.com/smart-page-with-video-widget")

@when('I check the auto-play button for the Video Widget')
def step_impl(context):
    video_widget = context.page.query_selector('video-widget-selector')
    auto_play_button = video_widget.query_selector('input[type="checkbox"][name="auto-play"]')
    auto_play_button.click()

@then('the auto-play setting should be enabled for the Video Widget')
def step_impl(context):
    auto_play_button = context.page.query_selector('input[type="checkbox"][name="auto-play"]')
    assert auto_play_button.get_attribute('checked') == 'true'
